Since 2007 · Made in Japan

Rest, fitted to the person.

A Japanese sleep-technology brand built on a single recyclable fiber — from the Olympic Village to the world's finest hotels.

Scroll
The airweave idea

airweave begins with one idea: that rest should be measured to the body, and that good sleep should cost the planet as little as possible. Built on airfiber® — a single, endlessly recyclable fiber — every product is tuned to the person who lies on it.

Personalization/ Sustainability/ Science/ Nobu/ Olympics/ Stores/ Fit
パーソナライズ · Personalization

Built around your body.

Every airweave mattress is made of airfiber® arranged in modular blocks. Reorder the firmness at the shoulder, waist and legs, and the support follows your spine into its natural curve — the same modular system athletes reconfigure for themselves in the Olympic Village.

3
Adjustable zones
∞
Firmness setups
1
Body — yours
サステナビリティ · Sustainability & Recycling

One fiber, endlessly remade.

airfiber® is a recyclable polyethylene core that is mostly air. The cover machine-washes and the fiber rinses clean in water, so bedding returns to pristine condition and is used again rather than discarded — built around three commitments.

Reuse
Cleaned & reused
Cover and fiber wash clean, then live a second life.
Recycle
Back to material
Fiber is washed, crushed and melted into new plastic — even new mattresses.
Biodegrade
Returns to earth
Biodegradable airfiber® breaks down into water and CO₂.
After the Games, the beds find new homes
Tokyo 2020
18,000 village beds
Donated after the Games — ~10,000 to national youth education centers, ~200 to Nishiyamato Gakuen.
Paris 2024
Donated across France
To the French Army, the Paris Opera Ballet School, a French culinary school and the charity Emmaüs.
JAL · since 2013
Horizontal recycling
8,200 business-class pads; in 2022, old pads were recovered and remade into new ones.
睡眠研究 · Science-Backed Facts

Comfort you can measure.

For us, comfort is a measurement before it is a feeling. airfiber® disperses body pressure so weight is shared evenly and the spine keeps its natural line — and better rest shows up the next day. airweave runs joint research with universities, with findings published in the peer-reviewed journal Scientific Reports.

  • MethodBody-pressure distribution measured, not estimated
  • OutcomeEven support, natural spinal alignment, easy turning
  • ProofMeasurable next-day performance, published openly
Nobu Hotel

Rest, the Nobu way.

Chef Nobu Matsuhisa — the restaurateur behind Nobu Hotels worldwide — is airweave's Global Brand Ambassador. For Nobu, the guest experience runs from the first bite to the night's rest.

“True luxury extends to how we recover.”Nobu Matsuhisa · Global Brand Ambassador
オリンピック · りくりゅう

Chosen, again and again, by the world's best.

airweave has furnished the Athletes' Village for two consecutive Summer Games with the same modular bedding anyone can buy. Among the athletes who trust it: figure skating's Riku-Ryu — Riku Miura & Ryuichi Kihara — who won Japan's first-ever Olympic pairs gold in 2026.

Tokyo 2020
Official Athletes' Village bedding — 18,000 modular beds.
Paris 2024
Official Bedding Supporter — ~16,000 beds, a second Summer Games.
2026 · Pairs Gold
Riku-Ryu take Japan's first Olympic pairs title — 231.24 total.
取扱店舗 · Global Retail Locations

Discover it in Japan. Take it home anywhere.

You may meet airweave long before you buy one — in a hotel suite, a theater seat, an airline cabin, a department-store floor. When you're ready, flagship and partner stores plus regional online stores make it easy to find airweave at home.

マットレスフィット · Mattress Fit Measurement

A fitting, not a guess.

Personalization begins with measurement. The MattressFit service reads your body in-store and translates it into a firmness map across the three zones — the same idea athletes used at the Olympic Village fitting centre, where a few measurements and photos return a recommended configuration.

  • InputBody measurements taken in-store or in-app
  • TranslateMapped to firmness at shoulder, waist and legs
  • ResultA configuration matched to you — end to end
For visitors to Japan

Slept well in Japan? Take it home.

If a hotel, a theater or a flight introduced you to airweave here, you can find it in your own market — the same fiber, fitted to you, wherever you live.
